# jans_scopes_by_creator (Data Source)

Data source for looking up OAuth scopes by their creator id (GET /scopes/creator/{creatorId}).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `creator_id` (String) The creator id to look up scopes for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scopes` (List of Object) The scopes created by the given creator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scopes))

<a id="nestedatt--scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes`

Read-Only:

- `creator_id` (String)
- `creator_type` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `dn` (String)
- `inum` (String)
- `scope_id` (String)
- `scope_type` (String)
